text:
EXPLANATION: The cited work is the well-known textbook "Deep Learning" authored by Ian Goodfellow, Yoshua Bengio, and Aaron Courville, published by MIT Press in 2016. The validation results were incorrect because they matched a different, less prominent work.

LINK: https://www.deeplearningbook.org/
FOUND_TITLE: Deep Learning
FOUND_AUTHORS: Ian Goodfellow, Yoshua Bengio, Aaron Courville
FOUND_YEAR: 2016
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
